_meta.notes: High-commitment strategy: a funds-to-science conversion running at factor=1.0 (maximum commitment). Shows long multi-bullet effect text. No other slots consumed — room for one more strategy. Good resources.

strategies.all.title: Open Source Tech
strategies.all.description: Share technologies with partner research institutes in exchange for science points.
strategies.all.activateBlockedReason: The Administration Facility cannot support more than 2 active strategies at this level
strategies.all.effect: Effects: * Converts 5% of Funds earned into Science points. * Reduces overall funding by 15%. * Provides a 2× multiplier on Science returns from experiments.

strategies.all.title: Fundraising Campaign
strategies.all.description: Reach out to the public for monetary donations.
strategies.all.activateBlockedReason: The Administration Facility cannot support more than 2 active strategies at this level

strategies.all.title: Aggressive Negotiations
strategies.all.activateBlockedReason: The Administration Facility cannot support more than 2 active strategies at this level
strategies.all.effect: Effects: * -1.5% Funds Off on Launch Costs and R&D Purchases. * -0.05% Funds Off on Facility Repair and Construction.
